overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night. The player character walks along neon-lit streets, crosses an intersection, and enters a covered plaza with palm trees before descending to a lower level. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring heavy neon lighting and wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with digital billboards

events.description: black sedan drives past on the wet street from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk next to the KENDACHI building, observing the neon signs and city traffic

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the wet street, passing by the camera

entered.detail: tall commercial building with large red KENDACHI signage and multiple tiers of digital billboards
multiple tiers of glowing digital advertisements on building facades featuring bright colors
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings with glowing neon edges
tall illuminated poles with rectangular white lights lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy cyberpunk street at night, with the camera walking forward along a wet sidewalk. The KENDACHI building dominates the right side with its prominent red signage and stacked digital billboards. Neon lights reflect off the rain-slicked asphalt as vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with yellow crosswalk markings

events.description: exits sidewalk and enters crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
turns left after crossing to follow the sidewalk along the hotel building

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet intersection, then turning left to walk along the sidewalk past the hotel signage

notable_agents.action: silver car driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: tall building with vertical blue neon HOTEL signage on the facade
massive curved screen displaying advertisements with prominent pink and red tones
broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing painted on the wet asphalt
storefronts with illuminated windows at street level along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide intersection marked with yellow stripes, navigating between moving vehicles. After crossing, the camera turns left to follow the sidewalk alongside a building with prominent blue HOTEL signage. Large digital billboards glow on the right as the character continues along the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with palm trees and vending machines

events.description: enters covered walkway area with palm trees and overhead protection from rain
passes by bright red vending machines and enters deeper into the covered plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered plaza, passing pedestrians with umbrellas and walking among palm trees

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with black umbrella walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: overhead glass and metal canopy providing shelter from the rain
tall palm trees in square planters lining the covered walkway
bright red automated vending machines with glowing display screens

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a covered pedestrian plaza sheltered from the rain by an overhead canopy. Tall palm trees line the walkway, and bright red vending machines stand out against the dark architecture. The character follows a pedestrian with an umbrella through this semi-enclosed space with reflective tiled flooring.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower level plaza with stairs and residential towers

events.description: begins descending wide concrete stairs to the lower plaza level
reaches bottom of stairs and enters the lower enclosed plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs to a lower plaza level, then continuing forward through the enclosed residential area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking up the stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings descending to lower level
sunken open plaza area with additional landscaping and lighting fixtures
tall apartment buildings with illuminated windows rising above the lower plaza

segments.scene_description: The character descends a wide staircase into a lower plaza level, passing a pedestrian coming up the stairs. The environment becomes more enclosed with tall residential towers visible in the background. The area is dimly lit with artificial lighting, and the rain is no longer falling in this sheltered sunken space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-drenched neon thoroughfare into a sheltered, sunken urban plaza. It begins by moving along a wet sidewalk dominated by the red signage and digital billboards of the KENDACHI building, with neon lights shimmering on the rain-slicked asphalt. As the camera crosses a wide, yellow-striped intersection between moving vehicles, the path shifts left toward a building marked by glowing blue hotel signage. The environment then transitions from the open street into a covered pedestrian plaza, where the rain gives way to an overhead canopy, reflective tiled floors, and a row of tall palm trees. Finally, the camera descends a wide staircase into a dimly lit lower level, moving away from the storm and into an enclosed space framed by towering residential blocks.
